title: MiniGPT required-term pair route held-out replay

settings.experiment_boundary: replay selected route pair-full seeds on held-out prompt surfaces without retraining

selected_route.rationale: highest pair-full seed count with the simplest non-first-token-density objective

report.title: MiniGPT required-term pair generation profile replay

settings.experiment_boundary: replay named generation profiles over archived fixed/loss branch-retention checkpoints without retraining

interpretation.reason: The suppression profile did not improve fixed/loss continuation hits on archived pair-retention checkpoints.
interpretation.next_action: Treat newline suppression as loss-alias cleanup only; the next model-capability step should train for pair coexistence.
